Tests cover:
1. Multi-phase append→crash→recover→continue lifecycle
2. Checkpoint healing via header dirty flag
3. Stale temp file isolation after interrupted rewrite
4. Autosave queue mutation tracking through faults
5. Durability mode behavior matrix (strict/balanced/throughput)
6. Rapid 10-cycle crash-recover stress test
7. Header dirty forces clean rewrite
8. V2 store segment corruption recovery
9. Read-only filesystem simulation
10. Mixed entry types through crash cycle
11. Corruption healed at checkpoint
12. Orphaned parent link detection
13. Save idempotency after recovery
14. Large session (100 entries) scattered corruption

Key design decisions:
- Uses public API only (no private field access from integration tests)
- TraceLog structured diagnostics system for debugging
- Forces full rewrites via header dirtying (set_model_header) instead of direct counter manipulation
- After recovery from corruption, healing save required before incremental appends work correctly","created_at":"2026-02-16T03:25:44Z"}]}

What was added:
- New field in phase1_matrix_validation payload: weighted_bottleneck_attribution
  schema: pi.perf.phase1_weighted_bottleneck_attribution.v1
- Per-scale breakdown:
  - for each required session_messages tier and partition, emits stage_pct for open/append/save/index.
- Global weighted ranking:
  - weighted by session_messages across pass cells
  - outputs weighted_contribution_pct and weighted stage ms per stage
  - emits 95% CI bounds (weighted normal approximation using effective sample size) for mean stage share.
- Lineage metadata: source stream/cell counts.

Validation run (Jain):
./scripts/perf/orchestrate.sh --skip-build --skip-env-check --output-dir target/perf/runs/bolddesert-phase1-ratios --suite bench_scenario --suite perf_budgets --suite perf_comparison --suite perf_regression

Observed ranking (current data):
- open ~42.37%
- append ~31.37%
- save ~19.14%
- index ~7.13%

Next for this bead: wire explicit consumption references for downstream opportunity-matrix/parameter-sweep tasks and add focused tests for attribution math edge cases.","created_at":"2026-02-17T02:13:36Z"}]}
